exampleSentences: Em đừng vội ra khỏi nhà khi trời còn mưa lớn nhé.
Anh ấy thường vội ăn sáng để kịp đến chỗ làm đúng giờ.
Chị đừng vội quyết định khi chưa suy nghĩ kỹ càng.
notes:
vội = to hurry, to rush, or to do something too quickly. It often has a feeling of “not taking enough time.”

It’s commonly used before another verb to show rushing or acting too fast.  

It can also describe a feeling or action as rushed, like a “vội” decision = a hasty decision.  
Strong memory link: vội vàng = very rushed; opposite idea: bình tĩnh (calm), từ từ (slowly).

translation.en: I am very in a hurry to go to work.

definitions.vi: Trong tình trạng gấp gáp; vội vàng.

example.en: I am in a hurry, so I can't stay long.
example.es: Tengo prisa, así que no puedo quedarme mucho tiempo.
example.vi: Tôi đang vội nên không thể ở lại lâu.

translation.en: I am very in a hurry to go to school.

exampleSentencesTranslated: Don't hurry out of the house when it is still raining heavily.
He often hurries his breakfast to hurry to work on time.
Don't hurry to make a decision when you haven't thought carefully.
notes_md:

It’s commonly used before another verb to show rushing or acting too fast.  

It can also describe a feeling or action as rushed, like a “vội” decision = a hasty decision.  
Strong memory link: **vội vàng** = very rushed; opposite idea: **bình tĩnh** (calm), **từ từ** (slowly).
